description: Add Firebase Storage export and create UploadField component, then integrate upload fields into the candidate form replacing URL-only inputs with upload+URL combo fields
steps: Step 1: Add Firebase Storage export to src/lib/firebase.js - import getStorage from 'firebase/storage' and export the storage instance alongside app, auth, db

Step 2: Create src/components/UploadField.js - a reusable upload component that: (a) accepts props: label, name, value, onChange, accept, userId, fullWidth; (b) shows a file input button styled with btn-primary class; (c) on file select, uploads to Firebase Storage at path candidates/{userId}/{name}/{filename} using uploadBytesResumable; (d) shows a progress bar during upload (Tailwind styled); (e) on completion, calls getDownloadURL and sets the value via onChange (simulating an event with e.target.name and e.target.value); (f) has a text input below for manual URL paste as alternative; (g) shows preview: image thumbnail for image/* files, filename text for PDF/video; (h) handles errors gracefully with user-visible error message; (i) supports large files up to 500MB

Step 3: Modify src/app/candidate/form/page.js - (a) add 'pasPhoto' field to formData initial state (currently missing); (b) import UploadField component; (c) import storage from @/lib/firebase (not needed in page if UploadField handles it); (d) replace the 'Upload Dokumen (Link Google Drive)' FormSection with a new section titled 'Upload Dokumen' that uses UploadField for each document field: pasPhoto (accept: image/*), sertifikatBahasaJepang (accept: image/*,.pdf), videoJFT (accept: video/*), sertifikatSSW (accept: image/*,.pdf), videoSSW (accept: video/*), cvRirekisho (accept: .pdf,image/*); (e) In the Ex-Magang section, replace the sertifikatSenmonkyuu and sertifikatSelesaiMagang InputFields with UploadField components (accept: image/*,.pdf); (f) pass user.uid as userId prop to each UploadField
Step 4: Verify the build passes with `npm run build`
acceptance_criteria: src/lib/firebase.js exports storage in addition to app, auth, db
src/components/UploadField.js exists and is a complete upload component with progress bar, preview, and manual URL input

The candidate form page imports and uses UploadField for all 8 document fields (pasPhoto, sertifikatBahasaJepang, videoJFT, sertifikatSSW, videoSSW, cvRirekisho, sertifikatSenmonkyuu, sertifikatSelesaiMagang)
Each UploadField has correct accept prop matching the file types specified
Progress bar is visible during upload
Manual URL input remains as alternative
verification: Run `npm run build` in /projects/sandbox/cv-portal and confirm it exits with code 0
